name: 90's Style Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: Oranges, mandarin, canned and drained (11 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a deep saucepan. Add broth and 4 teaspoons of curry powder. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
2. Remove from heat and allow the chicken to cool in the broth. When cool, separate the meat from the bones. Discard the bones and broth.
3. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and add it to a large bowl with the oranges, cashew halves, dates, and red pepper; set aside.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the yogurt, mayonnaise, coconut, chutney, and remaining teaspoon of curry powder; blend well.
5. Fold the yogurt dressing into the chicken-orange mixture.
6. Arrange lettuce cups on a large platter. Fill with salad and garnish with coconut and cashews.
Plain orange or lemon yogurt may be substituted.
